channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Apple just brought ChatGPT to iPhones, iPads, and Macs. Here’s how to make the most of it
item.description: This week, Apple rolled out its first significant update to its Apple Intelligence platform since it was launched in October.
item.dc:creator: Michael Grothaus, Fast Company

item.title: Chinese Hacking Campaign Exposes Phone Metadata of Over 1 Million Americans
item.description: Phone carriers have not notified victims of Chinese hacking efforts, exposing metadata of over a million people. Officials urge encrypted messaging apps use.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Trump hosts Apple CEO at Mar-a-Lago as big tech leaders continue outreach to president-elect
item.description: Donald Trump is hosting Apple CEO Tim Cook for a Friday evening dinner at the president-elect’s Mar-a-Lago resort.
item.dc:creator: Zeke Miller And Aamer Madhani, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Court denies TikTok's request to halt enforcement of potential US ban until Supreme Court review
item.description: A federal appeals court on Friday left in place a mid-January deadline in a federal law requiring TikTok to be sold or face a ban in the United States, rejecting a request made by the company to halt enforcement until the Supreme Court reviews its challenge of the statute.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: As AI makes its way into movies, Duncan Crabtree-Ireland is fighting for actors’ rights
item.description: After years of advocating for actors’ collective rights, Duncan Crabtree-Ireland is finally getting his own close-up.
item.dc:creator: Jackie Snow, Fast Company

item.title: Process Intelligence Revolutionizes Digital Transformation
item.description: CIOs leveraging process intelligence to navigate digital transformation challenges, upgrade SAP ERP platforms, and deploy generative AI initiatives.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Metaphor: ReFantazio, Dragon Age, Astro Bot and an indie wave lead the top AP video games of 2024
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — It’s been a rough year in the world of video games, which reeled from some high-profile flops (sorry, Suicide Squad and Star Wars fans) and a relentless series of developer layoffs. Fortunately, indie designers stepped up to fill in the gaps.
item.dc:creator: LOU KESTEN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Think you're safe? Identity theft could wipe out your entire life’s savings
item.description: A former Colgate-Palmolive employee was shocked to discover $750,000 had been drained from her 401(k) account. "CyberGuy" offers tips on how to prevent identity theft.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft Visual Studio Code 1.96 Released with Overtype Mode and Paste with Imports Feature
item.description: Visual Studio Code 1.96 released with overtype mode, paste with imports feature for JavaScript and TypeScript, and various other improvements.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Apple updates MDM tools for new Apple Intelligence features
item.description: Apple has introduced significant improvements for enterprise IT admins in the newly-released iOS 18.2, including the power to manage the latest salvo of additional Apple Intelligence features and more. Here’s a swift look at what’s new.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Helen King’s job is all about keeping AI safe as Google scales
item.description: More than a dozen years ago, U.K.-based game producer Helen King was about to take a new job at Ubisoft in Canada. She had already boxed up her possessions and was getting her visa in order when an opportunity at a London-based AI startup unexpectedly presented itself.
item.dc:creator: Harry McCracken, Fast Company

item.title: How to factory reset your iPhone
item.description: Factory resetting an iPhone is a crucial step to protect your privacy and prevent theft when you are selling, trading or donating your device.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: EPA awards $144 million to California to phase out big diesel trucks
item.description: The money will go to the state's transportation department, cities and school districts to buy 480 zero-emission vehicles.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Google claims breakthrough with Willow quantum computing chip but no real-world use yet
item.description: Google’s announcement on Monday of its new quantum chip, called Willow, was full of eye-catching statements. For starters, Willow took less than a minute to perform a benchmark computation that would take one of today’s fastest supercomputers 10 septillion years to do.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Android 2025 preview: 7 things to watch
item.description: As we look ahead to a whole new year of green-tinted Googley goodness, I’m feeling both guardedly excited — and curiously like Bill Murray in the movie Groundhog Day. Google’s got some pretty weighty pivots in the works for the Android arena right now.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Fortnite players 'tricked' into unwanted purchases are starting to get refunds. Here's how to apply
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. consumers who were “tricked” into purchases they didn't want from Fortnite maker Epic Games are now starting to receive refund checks, the Federal Trade Commission said this week.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: China launches anti-monopoly probe into Nvidia amid rising US-China chip tensions
item.description: China has initiated an investigation into Nvidia over alleged violations of the country’s anti-monopoly laws, signaling a potential escalation in the ongoing tech and trade tensions between Beijing and Washington.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: HPE execs reveal why they cancelled $700M AI server deal
item.description: There was one particular juicy tidbit during Hewlett Packard Enterprise’s (HPE’s) fourth quarter earnings call with financial analysts last week.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Energy prioritizes information sharing, AI for federated enterprise cybersecurity
item.description: The federated nature of the Energy Department's enterprise requires a focus on information sharing in order to identify and prevent cybersecurity events. The post Energy prioritizes information sharing, AI for federated enterprise cybersecurity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Daisy Thornton, Federal News Network

item.title: Extreme looks to tame complexity with AI-powered platform for network and security management
item.description: Extreme Networks is rolling out an AI-infused networking platform that aims to help enterprise customers integrate, manage and automate a broad range of network and security technologies.
item.dc:creator: Network World
